title: Transparency, auditability, and explainability of machine learning models in credit scoring
venue: Journal of the Operational Research Society
search_query: Transparency, auditability, and explainability of machine learning models in credit scoring
notes: A major requirement for credit scoring models is to provide a maximally accurate risk prediction. Additionally, regulators demand these models to be transparent and auditable. Thus, in credit scoring, very simple predictive models such as logistic regression or decision trees are...
